per_format_notes.crushr: structured JSON exists, but current phase uses crushr-info structural probes (no extraction outcome file counts)
per_format_notes.tar+gz: no structured per-file result artifact in execution corpus
per_format_notes.tar+xz: no structured per-file result artifact in execution corpus
per_format_notes.tar+zstd: no structured per-file result artifact in execution corpus
per_format_notes.zip: no structured per-file result artifact in execution corpus

mapping_report.extraction_markers: non-zero exit + extraction markers => failure_stage=EXTRACTION; result_class=REFUSED or PARTIAL based on refusal markers
mapping_report.pre_extract_markers: non-zero exit + structural markers => failure_stage=PRE_EXTRACT; result_class=STRUCTURAL_FAIL unless refusal markers also present
